combined_public_hearing_and_board_meetin.reason: Document header contains a five-digit typo year ('JANUARY 11, 20211'). Letterhead corroborates 2022: Antonio Reynoso introduced as the NEW Brooklyn Borough President (took office Jan 2022), Lincoln Restler listed as councilmember (seated 2022). Jan 11 was a Tuesday in 2022, a Monday in 2021, and Jan 2021's meeting (cb1-2021-01-12) already exists.
